vars.pr_context:
PR: Unified Storage Performance Optimizations
This PR optimizes the search index building by reducing lock scope in BuildIndex to allow concurrent builds.
vars.finding:
[0] pkg/storage/unified/search/bleve.go:104-141
  Description: Race condition introduced by reducing lock scope in BuildIndex. The previous code held cacheMu for the entire function, serializing all index builds. The new code only locks during cache assignment, allowing multiple goroutines to concurrently build indexes for the same key, causing file corruption and resource leaks.
  Existing code: b.cacheMu.Lock() // moved to only cache write
  Suggested fix: Restore lock at function start or implement per-key locking

vars.pr_context:
PR: Frontend Asset Optimization
This PR adds RWMutex-based caching for web assets to avoid redundant file reads.
vars.finding:
[0] pkg/api/webassets/webassets.go:48-52
  Description: Missing second check in double-checked locking pattern. After acquiring the write lock, the code must re-verify cache is nil. Without this, multiple goroutines will sequentially acquire the lock and redundantly compute the same result.
  Existing code: entryPointAssetsCacheMu.Lock() defer Unlock()
  Suggested fix: Add if entryPointAssetsCache != nil { return } after lock

vars.pr_context:
PR: Advanced SQL Analytics Framework
Adds SQL expression support with feature flag control.
vars.finding:
[0] pkg/expr/reader.go:195-200
  Description: Logic error in enableSqlExpressions: The function always returns false regardless of the feature flag state. The negation operator inverts the check, and both branches return false.
  Existing code: enabled := !h.features.IsEnabledGlobally(featuremgmt.FlagSqlExpressions)
  Suggested fix: return h.features.IsEnabledGlobally(featuremgmt.FlagSqlExpressions)

vars.pr_context:
PR: Advanced Query Processing Architecture
Refactors query splitting to apply template variables before shard splitting.
vars.finding:
[0] public/app/plugins/datasource/loki/shardQuerySplitting.ts:52-55
  Description: Template variables and ad-hoc filters are applied twice when shard splitting is used. runShardSplitQuery applies applyTemplateVariables, then runSplitQuery applies them again, causing duplicate filter injection.
  Existing code: const interpolated = queries.map(q => datasource.applyTemplateVariables(q))
  Suggested fix: Remove from runShardSplitQuery since runSplitQuery handles it

vars.pr_context:
PR: AuthZService: improve authz caching
Adds denial caching to reduce database load for authorization checks.
vars.finding:
[0] pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go:116-121
  Description: Cache consistency issue: permDenialCache is checked before permCache, and both have independent 30-second TTLs. When permissions are granted after a denial was cached, users remain denied for up to 30 seconds.
  Existing code: if denied, ok := s.permDenialCache.Get(key); ok { return false }
  Suggested fix: Check permCache first or invalidate denial entries on permission changes

metadata.case: Denial cache not invalidated after grant

vars.pr_context:
PR: FEATURE: Can edit category/host relationships for embedding
Adds CRUD for embeddable hosts with admin controller.
vars.finding:
[0] app/controllers/admin/embeddable_hosts_controller.rb:18
  Description: Nil reference vulnerability in destroy action. EmbeddableHost.where(id: params[:id]).first returns nil if record doesn't exist, calling host.destroy on nil causes NoMethodError.
  Existing code: host = EmbeddableHost.where(id: params[:id]).first; host.destroy
  Suggested fix: return render_json_error(404) unless host

vars.pr_context:
PR: OAuth credential sync and app integration enhancements
Adds webhook endpoint for credential synchronization between instances.
vars.finding:
[0] apps/web/pages/api/webhook/app-credential.ts:29
  Description: Timing attack vulnerability in webhook secret comparison. Direct string comparison using !== short-circuits on first mismatch, allowing attackers to measure response times.
  Existing code: if (req.headers[headerName] !== process.env.CALCOM_WEBHOOK_SECRET)
  Suggested fix: Use crypto.timingSafeEqual

vars.pr_context:
PR: SMS workflow reminder retry count tracking
Adds retry counting for failed SMS reminders with cleanup of expired ones.
vars.finding:
[0] packages/features/ee/workflows/api/scheduleSMSReminders.ts:43
  Description: Logic error in deleteMany query: The OR condition's second branch lacks method filter. Deletes EMAIL and WHATSAPP reminders with high retryCount, not just SMS.
  Existing code: OR: [{ scheduledDate: { lte: ... } }, { retryCount: { gt: 1 } }]
  Suggested fix: Add method: WorkflowMethods.SMS to retryCount condition

metadata.case: OR condition deletes wrong reminder types

vars.pr_context:
PR: Optimize spans buffer insertion with eviction during insert
Optimizes the span buffer pagination with a new OptimizedCursorPaginator.
vars.finding:
[0] src/sentry/api/paginator.py:877-882
  Description: OptimizedCursorPaginator allows negative offset slicing on Django QuerySets. Django doesn't support negative indexing — causes AssertionError.
  Existing code: queryset[cursor.offset:stop]
  Suggested fix: Validate offset is non-negative before slicing

vars.pr_context:
PR: Replays Self-Serve Bulk Delete System
Adds bulk delete functionality for replays with breadcrumb summarization.
vars.finding:
[0] src/sentry/replays/endpoints/project_replay_summarize_breadcrumbs.py:140
  Description: The get_request_data function mutates the input error_events list in-place with .sort(). Callers don't expect their list to be modified.
  Existing code: error_events.sort(key=lambda x: x['timestamp'])
  Suggested fix: Use sorted() to return new list

vars.pr_context:
PR: FIX: proper handling of group memberships
Refactors group member management with pagination and CRUD operations.
vars.finding:
[0] app/controllers/admin/groups_controller.rb:75
  Description: N+1 query in add_members. Loop calls User.find_by_username individually. With 1000 usernames, executes 1000 queries.
  Existing code: usernames.each { |u| User.find_by_username(u) }
  Suggested fix: User.where(username: usernames)

vars.pr_context:
PR: FIX: proper handling of group memberships
Refactors group member management with pagination.
vars.finding:
[0] app/controllers/groups_controller.rb:22
  Description: Unbounded limit parameter allows DoS attacks. Limit converted to integer without max validation.
  Existing code: limit = params[:limit].to_i
  Suggested fix: limit = [params[:limit].to_i, 100].min

vars.pr_context:
PR: Advanced SQL Analytics Framework
Adds SQL expression support with parser and DB stubs.
vars.finding:
[0] pkg/expr/sql/parser.go:26
  Description: SQL injection via string interpolation in stub code that always returns 'not implemented'. Only single quotes escaped.
  Existing code: fmt.Sprintf("SELECT json_serialize_sql('%s')", rawSQL)
  Suggested fix: Use parameterized queries

vars.pr_context:
PR: AuthZService: improve authz caching
Adds denial caching to reduce database load.
vars.finding:
[0] pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go:116
  Description: Unbounded cache growth in permDenialCache. Cache key includes high-cardinality name and parentFolder. Creates ~1M entries for 1000 users × 1000 resources.
  Existing code: s.permDenialCache.Set(key, true)
  Suggested fix: Add size limits or remove per-resource denial caching

vars.pr_context:
PR: feat: 2fa backup codes
Adds backup code generation and verification for two-factor auth.

PR: feat: 2fa backup codes
Adds backup code generation for two-factor authentication.
vars.finding:
[0] apps/web/pages/api/auth/two-factor/totp/setup.ts:61
  Description: Backup codes use only 40 bits of entropy (5 bytes). Should use at least 80 bits.
  Existing code: crypto.randomBytes(5).toString('hex')
  Suggested fix: crypto.randomBytes(10).toString('hex')

Adds credential sync between Cal.com instances via webhook.

  Description: CALCOM_CREDENTIAL_SYNC_ENDPOINT environment variable used in fetch without URL validation. Could allow SSRF.
